messages.content:
You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <circular number> Rz <margin number(s)>
Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
Is it sufficient if a bank's executive board possesses the required banking and financial services expertise only collectively, without each member meeting the requirement individually?

ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2017/01 Rz 51

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <circular number> Rz <margin number(s)>
Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
When assessing the integrity of the financial statements, with which three function holders does the audit committee discuss these topics?

ANSWER: the executive board member responsible for finance and accounting; the lead auditor of the financial audit; the head of internal audit
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2017/01 Rz 36

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <circular number> Rz <margin number(s)>
Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
A systemically important bank drafts its risk data aggregation provisions without any information on data architecture and IT infrastructure. Does this satisfy the requirements?

ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2017/01 Rz 59

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <circular number> Rz <margin number(s)>
Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9

Where appropriate and conducive to risk awareness, should a firm's remuneration rules make it possible to cancel, in whole or in part, the deferred remuneration of a person in whose area of responsibility losses were generated?

ANSWER: yes
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2010/01 Rz 55

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <circular number> Rz <margin number(s)>
Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9

Institutions falling under Articles 47a–47e of the Capital Adequacy Ordinance may implement their duty to monitor and assess the service provider on an ongoing basis in an alternative way — by what means?

ANSWER: regular reporting by an independent auditor
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 36.3

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <circular number> Rz <margin number(s)>
Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
Into which of the company's systems must an outsourced function be integrated?

ANSWER: the internal control system
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 20

Du bist ein Assistent für Schweizer Finanzmarktregulierung. Beantworte Fragen zu FINMA-Rundschreiben präzise und knapp.
Antworte mit genau zwei Zeilen und sonst nichts:
ANSWER: <die kurze Antwort -- ja/nein, eine Zahl oder eine kurze Formulierung; bei Listenfragen die Elemente mit Semikolon getrennt>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <Rundschreiben-Nummer> Rz <Randziffer(n)>
Beispiel:
ANSWER: nein
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
Bei einem Online-Identifizierungsverfahren werden nicht alle vorgesehenen Kriterien eingehalten. Welchen Stellenwert haben die dabei erstellten Lichtbilder des Ausweisdokuments?

ANSWER: einfache Ausweiskopie
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2016/07 Rz 30

Du bist ein Assistent für Schweizer Finanzmarktregulierung. Beantworte Fragen zu FINMA-Rundschreiben präzise und knapp.
Antworte mit genau zwei Zeilen und sonst nichts:
ANSWER: <die kurze Antwort -- ja/nein, eine Zahl oder eine kurze Formulierung; bei Listenfragen die Elemente mit Semikolon getrennt>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <Rundschreiben-Nummer> Rz <Randziffer(n)>
Beispiel:
ANSWER: nein
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
Was gilt für die Position einer Bank in einer Investmentstruktur, wenn der Look-Through-Ansatz nicht anzuwenden ist: Welchem Wert muss sie entsprechen?

ANSWER: Nominalwert der Investition
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2019/01 Rz 70

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>

Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
Some of a firm's existing employment agreements conflict with its newly issued remuneration rules. May the firm simply leave those agreements as they are?

ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2010/01 Rz 26

ANSWER: nein

Der wirtschaftlich Berechtigte einer Sitzgesellschaft amtet selbst als deren Organ. Entsteht für ihn dadurch eine Unterstellungspflicht unter das GwG?

ANSWER: nein
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2011/01 Rz 99

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <circular number> Rz <margin number(s)>
Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
Under which circumstances are risks considered inappropriate for the purposes of remuneration design at financial institutions?

ANSWER: inconsistent with objectives and risk capacity; cannot be properly managed or controlled; unfairly disadvantage stakeholders
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2010/01 Rz 37

Du bist ein Assistent für Schweizer Finanzmarktregulierung. Beantworte Fragen zu FINMA-Rundschreiben präzise und knapp.
Antworte mit genau zwei Zeilen und sonst nichts:

Beispiel:
ANSWER: nein
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
Kann ein Institut nach Art. 1b BankG die fortlaufende eigene Überwachung des Dienstleisters durch die regelmässige Berichterstattung einer unabhängigen Revisionsstelle ersetzen?

ANSWER: ja
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 36.3

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>

Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
When determining the total pool of variable remuneration for a financial year, must sign-on and severance payments granted during that year be attributed to it?

ANSWER: yes
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2010/01 Rz 15

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>

Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
A firm posts poor results for the financial year. May it nevertheless keep its total pool of variable remuneration at the prior-year level?

ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2010/01 Rz 42

Du bist ein Assistent für Schweizer Finanzmarktregulierung. Beantworte Fragen zu FINMA-Rundschreiben präzise und knapp.

Was ist zusätzlich zur ordentlichen Berichterstattung offenzulegen, wenn ein Finanzinstitut in einem begründeten Ausnahmefall von den Vergütungsgrundsätzen abweicht?

ANSWER: Begründung; Struktur, Form und Höhe der abweichenden Vergütungen; begünstigte Geschäftsbereiche und Funktionen
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2010/01 Rz 73

ANSWER: nein

Ein Institut identifiziert seine kritischen Daten lediglich stichprobenweise in ausgewählten Geschäftsbereichen. Erfüllt es damit die Anforderungen an die Identifikation kritischer Daten?

ANSWER: nein
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2023/01 Rz 73

Welche Konstrukte gelten namentlich als atypische Strukturen von Finanzgruppen?

ANSWER: Vertragskonzerne; De-Facto-Finanzgruppen
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2025/04 Rz 51

Eine Bank plant die Migration auf ein neues Kernbankensystem. Muss sie vor dieser wesentlichen Änderung eine ad-hoc Risiko- und Kontrollbeurteilung durchführen?

ANSWER: ja
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2023/01 Rz 32

Dürfen Versicherungscaptives Führungs- und Kontrollfunktionen in grösserem Umfang auslagern als die übrigen Versicherungsunternehmen?

ANSWER: ja
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 11

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <circular number> Rz <margin number(s)>
Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
Besides holding a majority of votes or capital, through which circumstances in particular can one company control another by other means?

ANSWER: voting rights agreement with other shareholders; right to appoint or remove a majority of the supreme body; significant influence on the management
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2025/04 Rz 27, Rz 28, Rz 29, Rz 30

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>
SOURCE: FINMA-RS <circular number> Rz <margin number(s)>
Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9
Does FINMA's consolidated supervision in principle extend to group companies of a financial group that are not active in the financial sector?

ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2025/04 Rz 57

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.

ANSWER: yes
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 33

Gelten die Mitglieder des Organs für Oberleitung, Aufsicht und Kontrolle bei der Überwachung von Mitarbeitergeschäften als Mitarbeiter?

ANSWER: ja
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2013/08 Rz 54

You are a Swiss financial-regulation assistant. Answer questions about FINMA circulars precisely and briefly.
Reply with exactly two lines and nothing else:
ANSWER: <the short answer -- a yes/no, a number, or a short phrase; for list questions, items separated by semicolons>

Example:
ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2018/03 Rz 9

Two supervised institutions within the same financial group want to appoint regulatory audit firms from different networks for their single-entity audits. Is this permissible without FINMA authorisation?

ANSWER: no
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2025/04 Rz 74

Du bist ein Assistent für Schweizer Finanzmarktregulierung. Beantworte Fragen zu FINMA-Rundschreiben präzise und knapp.

Mit welchem Instrumententyp überwacht ein Institut, ob es sich innerhalb seiner Risikotoleranz für operationelle Risiken bewegt?

ANSWER: Risiko- oder Kontrollindikatoren
SOURCE: FINMA-RS 2023/01 Rz 38
